title:
Our Commitment
To You
subtitle: CoBuddy is built on trust, respect, and mutual consent. Please review our core principles.
item1_desc: Every member is ID-verified to ensure a safe environment.
item2_desc: Strict policies against harassment or inappropriate behavior.
item3_desc: Your data is encrypted. We only share what's necessary.
item4_desc: Experiences are professional and clearly defined upfront.
